LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.description: A veteran Brotherhood vertibird pilot, [PAWN_nameDef] has hauled patrols, wounded, cargo, and dignitaries through weather and gunfire alike. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps a cool head, knows flightline discipline, and can trade stories with grunts and brass in equal measure.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.title: Vertibird pilot
